APP.thesis: High-conviction application software name with strong profitability and momentum; position trimmed to reduce portfolio beta and semi/AI cluster correlation while retaining alpha potential.

AVGO.thesis: Quality semiconductor and infrastructure software cash-flow compounder; kept as a small weight to diversify tech alpha without over-concentrating semi correlations.

BSX.thesis: Best-in-class medtech growth with low beta, high Sharpe and small drawdowns; a core quality growth anchor that supports higher risk-adjusted returns.

CB.thesis: Property & casualty insurer adds a low-correlation, quality/value sleeve; historically resilient with solid ROE and attractive risk-adjusted profile to lower portfolio beta.

DBMF.thesis: Managed futures ETF for crisis/trend-following diversification; low correlation to equities and bonds, improves drawdown resilience and Sharpe in macro shocks.

EIS.thesis: Small satellite EM exposure retained for differentiated return stream; minimized weight to limit beta while preserving potential idiosyncratic alpha.

IAU.thesis: Gold ETF provides a liquid, low-correlation hedge and inflation/stress ballast; historically improves portfolio VaR and correlation profile.

JNJ.thesis: Mega-cap pharma with durable cash flows and low beta; quality defensive growth to stabilize returns and reduce pairwise correlations.

JPM.thesis: Best-in-class diversified bank with strong risk-adjusted metrics; modest allocation for financials exposure without elevating beta excessively.

KO.thesis: Consumer staples franchise with high margins and defensive cash flows; lowers portfolio beta and correlation while contributing steady total return.

LMT.thesis: Defense prime with resilient backlog and lower correlation to tech; quality/value tilt that diversifies macro exposure.

MRK.thesis: Pharma leader with strong pipeline cash flows and defensive characteristics; improves quality tilt and lowers portfolio volatility.

NRG.thesis: Electric utility turnaround with strong Sharpe; retained at a smaller weight to keep alpha contribution while curbing cluster risk.

NVDA.thesis: Core AI leader and alpha engine; moderated allocation to reduce semi cluster correlation and beta while preserving upside.

PG.thesis: High-quality staples compounder; defensive ballast with consistent margins and low correlation, lifting risk-adjusted returns.

PLTR.thesis: AI/data analytics platform with improving profitability and momentum; reduced weight to manage beta yet retain asymmetric upside.

VCSH.thesis: Short-term IG corporate bond ETF; low volatility core that dampens drawdowns and lowers total portfolio correlation and beta.

WEC.thesis: Quality multi-utility with strong margins and defensive cash flows; enhances stability and lowers pairwise correlations.

added.CB: Added P&C insurance for low correlation, high quality/value, and defensive cash flows.
added.JNJ: Added mega-cap pharma to lower beta and improve quality tilt.
added.MRK: Added pharma leader for defensive growth and improved risk-adjusted returns.
added.KO: Added staples franchise to reduce beta and add stable total return.
added.PG: Added staples quality compounder to lower correlation and volatility.
added.LMT: Added defense exposure to diversify macro risk and reduce correlation with tech.
added.IAU: Added gold ETF as low-correlation hedge improving VaR and drawdown resilience.
added.DBMF: Added managed futures ETF for crisis alpha and structural diversification.

removed.AEE: Removed to simplify utilities sleeve and cut cluster correlation.
removed.ARM: Removed to reduce semi cluster correlation and valuation-driven risk.
removed.CEG: Removed to streamline utilities and lower beta in rate-sensitive names.
removed.CMS: Removed to reduce utilities clustering with WEC retained as core.
removed.CRDO: Removed due to high stress sensitivity and high correlation within semis.
removed.DGNX: Removed for extreme tail risk and illiquidity concerns.
removed.EMQQ: Removed due to middling risk-adjusted returns and correlation to growth.
removed.EQIX: Removed as REIT underperformer with rate sensitivity and negative alpha.
removed.EXOD: Removed speculative software to lower beta/correlation and improve quality tilt.
removed.FITB: Removed to reduce financials beta and cyclicality; JPM retained as quality.
removed.FR: Removed industrial REIT underperformer and high correlation within REIT cluster.
removed.FUFU: Removed speculative profile and poor risk-adjusted metrics.
removed.GREK: Removed to simplify EM sleeve and reduce correlation to growth beta.
removed.IGSB: Removed to consolidate short credit exposure into VCSH.
removed.IIPR: Removed due to persistent underperformance and drawdown risk.
removed.INTR: Removed to reduce EM bank volatility and beta.
removed.MTSI: Removed to reduce semi cluster and improve risk-adjusted profile.
removed.MU: Removed to reduce cyclical semi drawdown risk and high correlation.
removed.NLR: Removed to simplify commodities/thematic exposure in favor of IAU/DBMF.
removed.NU: Removed to reduce EM fintech beta and volatility.
removed.SGDM: Removed in favor of purer and lower beta gold exposure via IAU.
removed.SLVR: Removed to simplify precious metals exposure and reduce volatility.
removed.STAG: Removed REIT underperformer and correlation cluster participant.
removed.TRNO: Removed to eliminate REIT cluster and improve rate shock resilience.

adjusted.APP: Decreased allocation from 0.042 to 0.028 to lower portfolio beta and tech clustering.
adjusted.AVGO: Decreased allocation from 0.034 to 0.015 to reduce semi correlation and drawdown risk.
adjusted.BSX: Increased allocation from 0.051 to 0.077 due to strong low-beta growth and high Sharpe.
adjusted.EIS: Decreased allocation from 0.037 to 0.007 to minimize EM beta while keeping optionality.
adjusted.JPM: Decreased allocation from 0.043 to 0.030 to moderate financials beta while retaining quality exposure.
adjusted.NRG: Decreased allocation from 0.055 to 0.017 to reduce sector cluster risk while keeping alpha driver.
adjusted.NVDA: Decreased allocation from 0.065 to 0.061 to moderate semi cluster concentration while retaining core alpha.
adjusted.PLTR: Decreased allocation from 0.027 to 0.017 to manage beta while keeping asymmetric upside.
adjusted.VCSH: Increased allocation from 0.030 to 0.150 to materially lower volatility and pairwise correlation.
adjusted.WEC: Increased allocation from 0.020 to 0.082 to strengthen defensive ballast and reduce correlation.
